title: Built in Fort Worth: Wistron Opens Advanced Manufacturing Plant to Produce NVIDIA AI Systems
excerpt: The AI era runs on AI infrastructure. Many of these advanced systems are built and tested in Texas. Wistron opened its first U.S. manufacturing facility today in Fort Worth — a 324,000-square-foot greenfield plant producing superchips at the heart of some of the world’s most capable AI systems. In front of an audience of Wistron […]
content_html:
The AI era runs on AI infrastructure. Many of these advanced systems are built and tested in Texas.

Wistron opened its first U.S. manufacturing facility today in Fort Worth — a 324,000-square-foot greenfield plant producing superchips at the heart of some of the world’s most capable AI systems.

In front of an audience of Wistron executives, Taiwan government officials and local Fort Worth leaders, NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang took the stage with Wistron Chairman Simon Lin at the factory’s opening ceremony to talk about what it means to build the infrastructure for the AI era in America.

“Manufacturing is an essential pillar for every economy and every country,” Huang said. “Building chip plants, packaging plants, computer system plants like this, and AI factories all over the United States, has allowed the United States to really reindustrialize for the first time in a long time.”

The plant — Wistron’s D1 facility — currently runs two manufacturing cells: one producing the NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Superchip and one that will produce the NVIDIA Vera Rubin Superchip. D1 is scaling up this year to produce tens of thousands of boards per month of the most advanced technology in the industry. 

Building AI at scale takes more than chips and code. It takes factories, supply chains and skilled workers — a domestic manufacturing base capable of building at volume and adapting as the technology moves. The Fort Worth plant is where that capacity takes shape.

A $700 Million Commitment

The state-of-the-art facility represents a $700 million commitment to advanced manufacturing in the U.S. and has created over 500 new jobs across the Texas facility, with plans to expand to 1,000 by the end of the year. 

“It’s creating jobs in plumbing, construction, manufacturing and electricians,” Huang said. “So many different types of jobs here in the United States.”

“From the macro view of the whole AI world, down to community and country — it’s a great vision,” Lin said. “I think we’re going to enjoy the next era of AI life. I hope that we will be happier and healthier.”

NVIDIA has committed to manufacturing up to $500 billion in advanced AI platforms in the United States. The Wistron Fort Worth factory is one of the projects making that number real.

Building First in a Virtual World

Wistron designed and fully simulated the entire facility before construction began in a digital twin built on NVIDIA’s open platform, including Nemotron and Cosmos frontier models, Omniverse and Metropolis libraries, and open frameworks including PhysicsNeMo. 

That enabled Wistron engineers to validate assembly line layouts, optimize production processes and train workers on standard operating procedures virtually — before any system came online in the real factory. 

Winning Every Layer

The AI era isn’t just about chips — it’s about winning at every layer of the stack, from semiconductors to systems to the factories that build them.

“Just as agriculture is a fundamental infrastructure of society, in the future these AI factories will be a fundamental infrastructure of society,” Huang said. “Today we have roads and agriculture and railroads. In the future we’ll have AI factories and the internet. Electricity comes in … and the tokens get generated in the factories.”

The ceremony included the unveiling of the first NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Superchip produced on site, which Huang signed.

Huang described the system built around the NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Superchip as “the most powerful AI supercomputer in the world.”

“It has one-and-a-half million parts inside — two tons, 4 million dollars — and we’re producing them like phones, right here in Wistron, cranking them out in volume because the world needs all of these machines to drive the intelligence infrastructure,” Huang added. 

Huang also sat down for interviews with Mike Allen of Axios and separately with Lana Ferguson of the Dallas Morning News — who also covered Coherent’s groundbreaking of a new manufacturing facility in Sherman in June.

A new chapter of American manufacturing is taking shape in Fort Worth. Wistron’s factory is part of NVIDIA’s broader commitment to build in America, for America — strengthening U.S. supply chains, creating high-skilled jobs and giving American communities a direct role in building the future with AI.

blocks.html_en: <figcaption id="caption-attachment-96722">NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang joined Wistron Chairman Simon Lin and other technology leaders at the opening of Wistron’s new manufacturing facility in Fort Worth, Texas.</figcaption>

sentences.en: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang joined Wistron Chairman Simon Lin and other technology leaders at the opening of Wistron’s new manufacturing facility in Fort Worth, Texas.
sentences.zh: NVIDIA 首席执行官黄仁勋与纬创董事长林西蒙和其他技术领袖一起出席了纬创位于德克萨斯州沃思堡的新制造工厂的开业典礼。

blocks.html_en: “It has one-and-a-half million parts inside — two tons, 4 million dollars — and we’re producing them like phones, right here in Wistron, cranking them out in volume because the world needs all of these machines to drive the intelligence infrastructure,” Huang added.

sentences.en: “It has one-and-a-half million parts inside — two tons, 4 million dollars — and we’re producing them like phones, right here in Wistron, cranking them out in volume because the world needs all of these machines to drive the intelligence infrastructure,” Huang added.
sentences.zh: “它里面有五十万个零件——两吨，价值四百万美元——我们像手机一样生产它们，就在纬创这里，大量生产，因为世界需要所有这些机器来驱动智能基础设施，”黄补充道。

blocks.html_en: Huang also sat down for interviews with Mike Allen of Axios and separately with Lana Ferguson of the Dallas Morning News — who also covered Coherent’s groundbreaking of a new manufacturing facility in Sherman in June.

sentences.en: Huang also sat down for interviews with Mike Allen of Axios and separately with Lana Ferguson of the Dallas Morning News — who also covered Coherent’s groundbreaking of a new manufacturing facility in Sherman in June.
sentences.zh: 黄还接受了 Axios 的 Mike Allen 的采访，并分别接受了《达拉斯晨报》的 Lana Ferguson 的采访，后者还报道了相干公司 6 月份在谢尔曼新建制造工厂的奠基仪式。

blocks.html_en: A new chapter of American manufacturing is taking shape in Fort Worth. Wistron’s factory is part of NVIDIA’s broader commitment to build in America, for America — strengthening U.S. supply chains, creating high-skilled jobs and giving American communities a direct role in building the future with AI.

sentences.en: A new chapter of American manufacturing is taking shape in Fort Worth.
sentences.zh: 美国制造业的新篇章正在沃斯堡形成。

sentences.en: Wistron’s factory is part of NVIDIA’s broader commitment to build in America, for America — strengthening U.S. supply chains, creating high-skilled jobs and giving American communities a direct role in building the future with AI.
sentences.zh: 纬创资通工厂是 NVIDIA 在美国建设、为美国服务的更广泛承诺的一部分，即加强美国供应链、创造高技能就业机会并让美国社区在人工智能建设未来方面发挥直接作用。

content_html_zh:
AI时代运行在AI基础设施上。 许多先进系统都是在德克萨斯州建造和测试的。

纬创资通今天在沃思堡开设了第一家美国制造工厂，这是一座占地 324,000 平方英尺的绿地工厂，生产超级芯片，这些超级芯片是世界上一些最强大的人工智能系统的核心。

在纬创高管、台湾政府官员和沃斯堡当地领导人的见证下，NVIDIA 创始人兼首席执行官黄仁勋与纬创董事长林西蒙在工厂开业典礼上一起上台，谈论在美国建设人工智能时代的基础设施意味着什么。

“制造业是每个经济体、每个国家的重要支柱，”黄说。 “在美国各地建设这样的芯片厂、封装厂、计算机系统厂以及人工智能工厂，让美国很长一段时间以来第一次真正实现了再工业化。”

该工厂（纬创资通的 D1 工厂）目前运行两个制造单元：一个生产 NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra 超级芯片，另一个将生产 NVIDIA Vera Rubin 超级芯片。 D1 今年正在扩大规模，每月生产数万块采用业内最先进技术的电路板。

大规模构建人工智能需要的不仅仅是芯片和代码。 它需要工厂、供应链和熟练工人——一个能够大规模建设并随着技术发展而适应的国内制造基地。 沃斯堡工厂是这种产能形成的地方。

7亿美元的承诺

这座最先进的工厂代表了对美国先进制造业的 7 亿美元承诺，并在德克萨斯州工厂创造了 500 多个新就业岗位，并计划到今年年底扩大到 1,000 个。

“它为管道、建筑、制造和电工创造了就业机会，”黄说。 “美国有很多不同类型的工作。”

“从整个人工智能世界的宏观角度，到社区和国家——这是一个伟大的愿景，”林说。 “我认为我们将享受人工智能生活的下一个时代。 我希望我们能更快乐、更健康。”

NVIDIA 已承诺在美国生产高达 5000 亿美元的先进人工智能平台。 纬创沃思堡工厂是实现这一数字的项目之一。

在虚拟世界中构建第一个

纬创资通在 NVIDIA 开放平台上构建的数字孪生模型中设计并全面模拟了整个设施，其中包括 Nemotron 和 Cosmos 前沿模型、Omniverse 和 Metropolis 库以及包括PhysicsNeMo 在内的开放框架。

这使得纬创工程师能够在任何系统在真实工厂上线之前，以虚拟方式验证装配线布局、优化生产流程并培训工人标准操作程序。

赢得每一层

人工智能时代不仅仅关乎芯片，还涉及在堆栈的每一层取得胜利，从半导体到系统，再到制造它们的工厂。

黄说：“正如农业是社会的基础设施一样，未来这些人工智能工厂也将成为社会的基础设施。” “今天我们有公路、农业和铁路。 未来我们将拥有人工智能工厂和互联网。 电力来自…… 代币是在工厂中生成的。”

仪式还包括现场生产的首款 NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Superchip 的揭幕仪式，并由黄仁勋签署。

Huang 将围绕 NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Superchip 构建的系统描述为“世界上最强大的 AI 超级计算机”。

“它里面有五十万个零件——两吨，价值四百万美元——我们像手机一样生产它们，就在纬创这里，大量生产，因为世界需要所有这些机器来驱动智能基础设施，”黄补充道。

黄还接受了 Axios 的 Mike Allen 的采访，并分别接受了《达拉斯晨报》的 Lana Ferguson 的采访，后者还报道了相干公司 6 月份在谢尔曼新建制造工厂的奠基仪式。

美国制造业的新篇章正在沃斯堡形成。 纬创资通工厂是 NVIDIA 在美国建设、为美国服务的更广泛承诺的一部分，即加强美国供应链、创造高技能就业机会并让美国社区在人工智能建设未来方面发挥直接作用。
